nodes.name: home-paths.ts
nodes.summary: Provides utility functions for resolving Paperclip home directory paths, including default config, logs, storage, backup, embedded Postgres, and agent workspace directories relative to the instance root.

nodes.name: resolveDefaultAgentWorkspaceDir
nodes.summary: Resolves the default agent workspace directory path for a given agent ID, validating the ID format and composing it under the instance root.

nodes.name: sanitizeFriendlyPathSegment
nodes.summary: Sanitizes a string value into a safe filesystem path segment by trimming, replacing disallowed characters, and falling back to a default value.

nodes.name: resolveManagedProjectWorkspaceDir
nodes.summary: Resolves the workspace directory path for a managed project given company, project, and optional workspace identifiers, sanitizing each path segment.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Primary server entry point that bootstraps the Paperclip server: loads config, initializes telemetry, sets up embedded Postgres, applies DB migrations, starts the Express/WebSocket server, and registers all services and routes.
nodes.languageNotes: The startServer function (820 lines) orchestrates the entire server lifecycle including embedded Postgres setup, migration checks, authentication, and live event WebSocket binding.

nodes.name: startServer
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full Paperclip server startup sequence: config loading, telemetry, database initialization, migration management, route registration, WebSocket setup, and background service initialization.

nodes.name: join-request-dedupe.ts
nodes.summary: Provides deduplication helpers for human join requests, including identity normalization, finding reusable pending/approved requests by user ID or email, and collapsing duplicate pending requests.

nodes.name: findReusableHumanJoinRequest
nodes.summary: Searches a list of join request rows to find an existing pending or approved human join request that matches the given actor by user ID or normalized email address.

nodes.name: collapseDuplicatePendingHumanJoinRequests
nodes.summary: Filters a list of join requests to remove duplicate pending human requests based on identity, retaining only the first occurrence per unique identity.

nodes.name: log-redaction.ts
nodes.summary: Implements log redaction utilities that replace OS usernames, home directory paths, and other PII in log output with masked tokens to prevent sensitive data leakage.

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: Express middleware for resolving the authenticated actor on each request, supporting board/agent/user authentication via bearer tokens, session cookies, and local-trusted mode.

nodes.name: actorMiddleware
nodes.summary: Factory function returning an Express RequestHandler that resolves the current actor (board, agent, or user) from the incoming request and attaches it to req.actor.

nodes.name: board-mutation-guard.ts
nodes.summary: Express middleware guard that blocks browser-session board mutations unless the Origin or Referer header matches the trusted server host, defending against CSRF attacks.

nodes.name: boardMutationGuard
nodes.summary: Returns an Express RequestHandler that enforces CSRF-like origin checks on mutating board requests from browser sessions.

nodes.name: error-handler.ts
nodes.summary: Express error-handling middleware that maps HttpError and ZodError instances to appropriate HTTP status responses, attaches error context for logging, and reports 500 crashes to telemetry.

nodes.name: errorHandler
nodes.summary: Express four-argument error handler that converts HttpError, ZodError, and unknown errors into structured JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes.

nodes.name: http-log-policy.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the HTTP access log suppression policy, silencing high-frequency successful GET requests to polling endpoints, health checks, and static asset paths to reduce log noise.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the logger, httpLogger, errorHandler, and validate middleware from the middleware package.

nodes.name: logger.ts
nodes.summary: Configures and exports the pino logger and pinoHttp HTTP access logger, writing colorized info logs to stdout and full debug logs to a rotating file, with authorization header redaction.

nodes.name: private-hostname-guard.ts
nodes.summary: Express middleware that blocks requests whose Host header does not match the configured allowed hostname allowlist, preventing host-header injection attacks on private Paperclip instances.

nodes.name: resolvePrivateHostnameAllowSet
nodes.summary: Builds the Set of allowed hostnames from configured values and the bind host, always including loopback addresses.

nodes.name: validate.ts
nodes.summary: Thin Express middleware factory that parses and validates request body against a Zod schema, replacing req.body with the parsed result.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Onboarding instructions for the CEO agent role, defining delegation rules, routing to direct reports, the personal memory system, and key references to HEARTBEAT, SOUL, and TOOLS files.

nodes.name: HEARTBEAT.md
nodes.summary: Execution checklist for the CEO agent to run on every heartbeat, covering identity confirmation, planning review, approval follow-up, task assignment retrieval, and checkout/work procedures.

nodes.name: SOUL.md
nodes.summary: Persona and communication guidelines for the CEO agent, defining strategic posture, decision-making principles, voice and tone standards.

nodes.name: TOOLS.md
nodes.summary: Tool reference document for the CEO agent listing the available tools and capabilities.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Default onboarding instructions for all Paperclip agents, defining the execution contract, task disposition rules, child issue patterns, and confirmation workflows.

nodes.name: paths.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves the Paperclip config file path and env file path by walking ancestor directories for a .paperclip/config.json file, with environment variable and override support.

nodes.name: live-events-ws.ts
nodes.summary: Sets up the WebSocket server for real-time live event streaming, handling connection upgrades with authentication (agent API key, session, or local-trusted mode) and forwarding company-scoped events to subscribed clients.

nodes.name: redaction.ts
nodes.summary: Implements event payload redaction that scrubs secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords, and sensitive CLI arguments from structured payloads before they are logged or transmitted.

nodes.name: access.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Express router for access management: user invites, join requests, CLI auth challenges, company membership management, permission grants, board ownership claiming, and agent API key management.
nodes.languageNotes: At 4410 lines this is the largest route file in the server, covering the full lifecycle of access control including SSRF-safe invite URL validation.

nodes.name: activity.ts
nodes.summary: Express router providing CRUD endpoints for company activity log entries, with per-issue activity retrieval and board-level activity creation.

nodes.name: adapters.ts
nodes.summary: Express router for adapter plugin management, providing endpoints to list, install from npm or local paths, enable/disable, and unregister external adapter plugins; instance-admin access required for mutating operations.

nodes.name: agents.ts
nodes.summary: Large Express router for agent lifecycle management including CRUD operations, skills sync, instruction bundles, workspace commands, hiring workflows, org chart rendering, and environment/adapter management.
nodes.languageNotes: At 3448 lines this is one of the two largest route files, covering every aspect of the agent lifecycle from creation to skill sync and budget management.

nodes.name: approvals.ts
nodes.summary: Express router implementing the approvals workflow: creating, listing, resolving, revising, and resubmitting approvals, with payload redaction and heartbeat integration.
